dep.name: sqlalchemy
dep.purpose: ORM for PostgreSQL models and queries

dep.name: requests
dep.purpose: HTTP client for Polza.AI API proxy

module-level.focus: Unit tests for individual functions and API endpoints

wave-level.command: curl-based API smoke tests against running server
wave-level.focus: Verify new endpoints return correct JSON shapes

phase-level.command: Manual browser testing + curl health check
phase-level.focus: Full dashboard functionality, data integrity, performance

Testing.mocking-policy: Use real PostgreSQL on test DB. Mock only external API calls (Polza.AI).

Observability.logger: print() to stdout (captured in dashboard.log via nohup)
Observability.redaction: Never log API tokens, user prompts, or response content in full.

DeliveryShape.shape: Single Flask process (threaded=True) on Ubuntu VM. PostgreSQL 16 on same host. No containerization. Background threads for sync (5 min), backfill (on-demand), summarizer (on-demand).

api.name: Polza.AI Generation Detail
api.purpose: Full detail with metadata.externalUserId for session_id
